zh.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I是Philip de Stackpole II的兒子，於1250年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾。他與Isabel de Londres結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I是Philip de Stackpole II的儿子，于1250年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾。他与Isabel de Londres结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stackpole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: habitational name from Stackpole (Pembrokeshire), apparently named with Old Norse stakkr ‘stack’ + pollr ‘pool’, referring to a stack of rocks on the coast at the entrance to Broadhaven. The name was taken to Ireland and adapted by settlers of Norman descent, where it is recorded in Dublin as early as 1200. The name has been Gaelicized as de Stacapúl; the family was also known in Irish as Galldubh ‘dark stranger’.

variants.name: Stackpoole
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Welsh: variant of   Stackpole  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I was born in 1250, in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Philip de Stackpole II. He married Isabel de Londres. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I est né en 1250, à Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Philip de Stackpole II. Il a épousé Isabel de Londres. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I wurde 1250 in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Philip de Stackpole II geboren. Er hat Isabel de Londres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I è nato il nel 1250 nel Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Philip de Stackpole II. Lui sposato Isabel de Londres. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスタクプオル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole Iは1250年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスタクプオルでPhilip de Stackpole IIの息子として生まれた。Isabel de Londresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Stackpole I(은)는 1250년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 스타ck포일에서 Philip de Stackpole II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabel de Londres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
